text.title: OpenAPI Specification Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: FastAPI service with server-generated spec + drift gate
example.note: openapi_version=3.1.0; canonical_path=openapi.yaml regenerated nightly by `fastapi run --export-openapi`; Spectral enforces named examples; oasdiff blocks BREAK; coverage 42/42 operationIds; reuse ratio 0.85. After a model change without regenerate, CI failed with diff; engineer ran make openapi-snapshot, committed, merged green.

example.title: Hand-authored spec with inline schemas
example.note: User schema inlined in 7 responses; first PR rename forgot 3 of them; clients silently received mixed shapes. Decision tree caught it: ref-reuse-required → halt; move to components/schemas/User.
